name: LiveWire Group, Inc.
description: LiveWire Group, Inc. is a dedicated electric motorcycle company that focuses on the design, development, and manufacturing of high-performance electric motorcycles. Originally spun off from Harley-Davidson, the company aims to lead the electric vehicle transition in the motorcycle industry by combining advanced technology with a unique, soulful riding experience. LiveWire offers a range of electric models, including the LiveWire ONE and the S2 Del Mar, catering to urban commuters and performance enthusiasts alike. Headquartered in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, the company is committed to shaping the future of motorcycling through innovation, sustainability, and a distinct brand identity.
